# Core dependencies for slide-image-rebuild scripts.
Pillow>=10.0
cairosvg>=2.7
cairocffi>=1.6
python-pptx>=1.0
PyYAML>=6.0

# Optional (see requirements-optional.txt): curl_cffi enables TLS-impersonating
# HTTP fetches in project_manager.py import-sources (URL sources). The code
# falls back gracefully when it's absent.
